# Archived Workflows

These workflows were disabled during Phase B repo canonicalization because they depended on removed legacy root infrastructure and source-first build paths.

Archived:

- `build-and-publish.yml.disabled`
- `license-scanning-node.yml.disabled`
- `security.yml.disabled`

Active quality gates:

- `spec-kit-root-gates.yml`
- `docs-spec-sanity.yml`
